auth.title: Welcome to Mosaic
auth.subtitle: Sign in to register for events and manage your registrations.
auth.magicLinkSent: Check your inbox — we sent you a sign-in link.

home.heroSubtitle: Conferences, camps and gatherings — find your event and register in your language.
home.noEvents: No published events yet. Check back soon.

wizard.title: Register for {event}
wizard.typeCountHelp: Choose how many people you are registering in each category.
wizard.successBody: You can see the status of every participant below.
wizard.submitError: Something went wrong while submitting. Your answers are saved on this device — please try again.
wizard.modeTitle: Is this a single or a group registration?
wizard.modeHelp: You can register just yourself, or several people at once.
wizard.modeFamilyHelp: I'm registering a group (e.g. my family).
wizard.noModeSelected: Choose a registration type to continue.
wizard.singleTypeTitle: What type of participant are you?
wizard.singleTypeHelp: Pick the option that describes you.
wizard.alreadyRegistered: You have already registered for this event. You can review or edit your registration while registration is open.

validation.notAnOption: Choose one of the listed options

myRegs.title: My registrations
myRegs.empty: You have not registered for any events yet.
myRegs.cancelConfirm: Cancel {name}? A waitlisted participant may take this spot.

console.title: Events Hub
console.noAccess: You do not have organizer access. Contact an administrator.
console.previewHint: This is a preview — answers are not saved.
console.noParticipants: No participants match the current filters.
console.createError: Something went wrong creating the event. Please try again.
console.createNoAccess: Your account does not have permission to create events. Ask an administrator to grant you organizer access.
console.createDateError: The end date must be after the start date.
console.contactHelp: Shown publicly on the event page.
console.selectTypeHelp: Add a participant type from the list below, or create your own.
console.adminUsersHelp: Admins manage everything, including this console. Global organizers can manage every event. Anyone can create their own events.
console.transferConfirm: Transfer super admin to {name}? You will become a regular admin.
console.levelViewDesc: View and export registrations and payments.
console.levelScholarshipDesc: View, plus manage and add scholarships.
console.levelCheckinDesc: Scholarship, plus add registrants and edit, add or delete payments.
console.levelUpdateDesc: Check-in, plus change the event and its questions, and delete registrants.
console.levelFullDesc: Can do everything, including managing the team.
console.requestRoleTitle: Want to help manage all events?
console.requestRoleIntro: Global organizers can view and manage every event. Request the role and an administrator will review it.
console.rolesHelp: What each role allows. Standard roles can have their privileges turned on or off but cannot be renamed or deleted; custom roles are fully editable while unused.
console.customRolesEventHelp: Define roles available only on this event. Roles marked “All events” are managed from the admin console.
console.roleInUse: This role is still assigned to at least one team member.
console.saveFailed: Saving failed — your latest changes are not stored
console.publishFailed: Publishing failed — the form was not published
console.loadError: Could not load participants. Adjust your search or try again.
console.newFormError: Could not create the form. Please try again.
console.formModeSingleHelp: Shown when a respondent registers only themself.
console.formModeFamilyHelp: Shown when a respondent registers a group.
console.copyQuestionsHelp: Reuse the questions of an existing form so you don't have to rebuild them.
console.publishNeedsQuestion: A form must include at least one question
console.noMyEvents: You're not part of any events yet. Create one, or request to join an event below.
console.addByEmailHelp: Grant a global role by email. If they haven't signed in to Mosaic yet, they'll be invited and the role applied on their first sign-in.
console.roleGranted: Role granted. A notification email is on its way.
console.inviteSentPending: Invitation sent. The role will be applied automatically when they first sign in.
console.inviteRecordedNoEmail: Invitation recorded, but the notification email couldn't be sent. Check the SMTP settings.
console.roleGrantedNoEmail: Role granted, but the notification email couldn't be sent. Check the SMTP settings.
console.eventCodeHelp: Share this code so people can request to join this event.
console.joinEventsHelp: You can request access to organize or view other events in this organization.
console.joinEventsAllAccess: You have admin access and can view all events.
console.joinEventsEmpty: There are no other active events to join.
console.joinByCodeHelp: Enter the event's slug/code (e.g. summer-conference-2026) to request organizer access.
console.defaultFormTip: This form is used when no matching single or group response form exists.
console.visibilityHelp: Unlisted events don't appear on the public list — only people with the link can open them.
console.visibilityPublic: Public — shown on the home page
console.deleteEventDraftWarning: This event was never published. It will be permanently deleted along with its forms, participant types, and settings. This cannot be undone.
console.deleteEventPublishedWarning: This event has been published before, so it will be hidden from everyone — including you — but kept in the database as archive history.
console.deleteEventError: Could not delete the event. Please try again.
console.draftNote: This event is a draft — the public page goes live when you publish it.
console.heading: Heading
console.coverHelp: Shown as the hero background at the top of the page.
console.heroDescriptionHelp: Short intro shown in the hero, under the title.
console.tierFeaturesHelp: One item per line in "What's included".
console.uploadBadType: Unsupported file type. Use JPG, PNG, WebP or AVIF.
console.uploadTooLarge: Image is too large. Maximum size is 5 MB.
console.statsHelp: Short highlights shown in the About section, e.g. “50+” and “Workshops”.
console.applyToAllTitles: Apply This Color To All Section Titles
console.countdownHelp: Counts down to the event start date, shown next to the button.
console.mapEmbedHelp: Paste any Google Maps link, or leave empty to use the address above.
console.sectionOrderHelp: Reorder how sections appear on the page. The hero always stays on top.
console.testimonialHeadingHelp: The heading is optional — leave it empty to show only the quotes.
console.countdownPastHelp: If the chosen date is already in the past, the countdown hides itself — pick a future one (e.g. event end).
console.videoHelp: Paste a video link — it shows instead of the image.
console.heroOpacityHelp: Tints the cover image. With no image the color fills the hero solid.
console.pagePreviewHint: This is the page as attendees see it. Hover a section and click the pencil to edit it.
console.slugHelp: Used in the event's public link. Changing it breaks the old link.
console.slugWarnBody: The public link will change from “/events/{old}” to “/events/{next}”. Anyone with the old link — flyers, emails, messages already shared — will no longer reach this event. Continue?
console.dateFormatHint: Dates are shown to each person in their own preferred date format (set in their profile).
console.primaryColorHelp: The primary color paints buttons, links, highlights and section accents.
console.contrastWarning: Low contrast ({ratio}:1). Text may be hard to read — aim for 4.5:1 or higher.
console.fontScopeHelp: These apply to the whole page. To change one section only, edit it in that section's tab.
console.faviconHelp: The small icon shown in the browser tab.
console.availableLanguagesHelp: Visitors can switch between the languages you enable here.
console.translateAllHelp: Fills empty language fields by translating your default-language text with AI. Existing text is kept. Review, then Save.
console.translateDone: Translated. Review the other languages, then Save Page.
console.translateNoKey: Auto-translation isn't set up yet (missing API key). Ask your admin to add GOOGLE_TRANSLATE_API_KEY.
console.translateNoTargets: Enable at least one other language first.
console.translateNothing: Nothing to translate yet — add some text first.
console.customLanguageHelp: Custom languages: you fill in all the text yourself in a new tab. Fixed platform buttons stay in the default language.
console.languagesHelp: Choose which languages this event and its registration form are offered in. Attendees can switch between them; the default is used when a translation is missing.
console.defaultLanguageHelp: Used as a fallback wherever a translation is missing.

profile.title: My profile
profile.namePromptRequired: Please enter your first and last name.
profile.themeHelp: Choose light or dark, or follow your device.
profile.updateError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
profile.formatPromptIntro: How should dates and times look? You can change this anytime in your profile.
profile.welcomeNameIntro: Add your name so organizers know who you are. You can change it later in your profile.
